commentary.text: Hill baulks away from Cumming and passes across half forward for Flanders 45m out in the corridor, whose set shot dies in its trajectory and is rushed.
Banfield steers through his first senior goal from a set shot from 30m on the flank.
Sinclair passes to Byrnes 45m out on a slight angle in between two Tigers. Byrnes pushes his drop punt to the right.
Henry spoils Trainor's rebound kick down to Carroll who just misses from 40m off his left.
Carroll sends a repeat inside 50 pass to Henry to mark in front of Vlastuin 30m out in the pocket, whose set shot is narrow to the right.
Faull roves at half back but gets caught HTB by the first-gamer Banfield. Set shot from 50m on a slight angle is hoofed right and OOTF.
Wilson passes from the centre to the flank 40m out for Higgins to mark on a double lead. Higgins kicks straight, just inside the near right post.
Cumming sprints to CHF after the first centre contest of Q3, his snap is a shank but it lands with Fawcett 20m out in the pocket, who goals.
Green fights for the crumb from Hayes-Brown's free kick from the centre, he reefs out a handball to Fawcett who snaps the goal off his right from the hotspot.
De Koning marks over Tresize 45m out on the flank and kicks his second goal.
#####St Kilda loses Mitch Owens but regains Jack Higgins, while the Tigers copped another two injuries last week to take their injury list to a full 18.
The game played out pretty much as expected: some lively play by Richmond early but they just didn't have the cattle on the park.
